presentation.chiefComplaint: Trouble breathing and full-body hives after eating at a restaurant

history.hpi: Sudden onset of diffuse urticaria, lip and tongue swelling, throat tightness, and wheezing 10 minutes after eating shellfish. Now feeling light-headed and has vomited once.
redFlags: Rapidly progressing wheeze with known allergen exposure

expert.esiRationale: Anaphylaxis with airway involvement and hypotension is an immediate life threat requiring intramuscular epinephrine and resuscitation now. ESI 1: requires immediate life-saving intervention.

provenance.sourceRef: ED Triage Trainer hand-authored seed case
